history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, slightly grainy, medium shot photo captures a person from the chest up, sitting on a black motorcycle. The rider is wearing a black helmet that covers most of their face, with a black mask or scarf obscuring their lower face. They are dressed in a black hoodie and dark pants. The motorcycle is a custom build with a prominent round headlight, exposed engine parts, and black handlebars.

The background depicts a rural or suburban street scene. To the left, a sign for "mart" is visible, along with some simple buildings with tiled roofs. Further down the street, there are small shops or food stalls with awnings. The sky is cloudy, with power lines crisscrossing overhead. The overall lighting is overcast, creating soft shadows. The mood is somewhat mysterious and urban, with a focus on the solitary figure on the motorcycle. The color palette is exclusively black, white, and shades of gray.
